scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:auth" "npm run dev:matches" "npm run dev:predictions" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.build: npm --workspace auth-service run build && npm --workspace matches-service run build && npm --workspace predictions-service run build && npm --workspace frontend run build
scripts.lint: npm --workspace auth-service run lint && npm --workspace matches-service run lint && npm --workspace predictions-service run lint && npm --workspace frontend run lint
scripts.prisma:generate: cd backend/auth-service && npx prisma generate && cd ../matches-service && npx prisma generate && cd ../predictions-service && npx prisma generate
